## What does this PR do?
A clear summary of the change and the problem it solves.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Improvement to existing feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## How was it tested?
Describe what you tested and on what environment (portable build, running from source, etc.).

## Screenshots
If this changes any UI, include before/after screenshots.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have tested this change against a running Trier OS instance
- [ ] No hardcoded IPs, credentials, or personal data included
- [ ] Console is clean (no new errors or warnings)
